panels.beatGoal: Launch the detectives into the body.
panels.medicalObjective: Bridge bedside context to internal anatomy.
panels.actionSummary: The doctor activates the shrinking portal while the detectives leap toward the luminous gateway.
panels.compositionNotes: Portal centered with strong forward motion toward the page turn.
panels.humorOrTensionNote: One detective insists the fake star-map can help navigate.
panels.renderIntent: big energetic franchise shot that marks entry into the body

panels.beatGoal: Show the liver environment from the detectives' new scale.
panels.medicalObjective: Introduce a liver landscape that already hints at chronic damage.
panels.actionSummary: The detectives ride a current past weathered liver terrain and stare at an uneven horizon of tissue.
panels.clueRevealed: The tissue environment looks chronically abnormal before the main lesion is identified.
panels.compositionNotes: Use flowing vessels as leading lines toward the tissue landscape.
panels.humorOrTensionNote: The fake map points in the wrong direction again.
panels.renderIntent: visually beautiful anatomical wonder shot with subtle menace

panels.beatGoal: Reveal a suspicious focal region worth investigating.
panels.medicalObjective: Suggest autonomous abnormal growth without naming the diagnosis.
panels.actionSummary: They hover near a district of cells whose architecture breaks the surrounding pattern.
panels.clueRevealed: A focal abnormal region behaves like a hidden stronghold within the liver.
panels.compositionNotes: Contrast the suspicious region against more orderly surrounding tissue.
panels.humorOrTensionNote: Humor drops out to let the clue land.
acceptanceChecks: no explicit diagnosis label in art
clear contrast between normal and abnormal tissue
